fields.seeds: Seed list for launching multiple repeated runs
fields.n_gaussians: Number of Gaussian components per elevation profile
fields.logdir: Base directory for run outputs and checkpoints
fields.pixel_subsample: Fraction of pixels sampled for training; 1.0 keeps all
fields.keep_empty_frac: Fraction of empty/background profiles retained when subsampling
fields.profile_augmentation: Augmentation settings applied to input profiles
fields.ae_model_name: Registry key selecting the autoencoder architecture
fields.model_overrides: Dict overriding selected model's default hyperparameters
fields.geometry: SAR acquisition geometry defining elevation sampling axis
fields.paths: Input data and run output path locations
fields.training: Data-loading queue: batch size, workers, prefetch

tuning/general::TuningConfig.summary: Optuna hyperparameter search controls: trial budget, seeding, pruning, and artifact emission

fields.n_trials: Number of Optuna trials to run in the study
fields.base_seed: Base RNG seed for reproducible trial sampling
fields.early_stop_patience: Epochs without improvement before halting a trial
fields.pruner_n_startup_trials: Trials run before the pruner begins acting
fields.pruner_n_warmup_steps: Intermediate steps per trial before pruning may occur
fields.emit_trial_docs: Whether to write per-trial documentation artifacts
fields.emit_study_plots: Whether to render study-level visualization plots

tuning/general::TuningEntryConfig.summary: Top-level entry point wiring a tuning run: model type, resources, data, and nested configs

fields.training_type: Model type to tune, e.g. backbone or autoencoder
fields.paths: Run and log directory locations for tuning outputs
fields.gpus: GPU device IDs available for parallel trials
fields.skip_models: Model names to exclude from the sweep
fields.run_tag: Optional label identifying this tuning run
fields.n_gaussians: Number of Gaussian mixture components along elevation
fields.training: Training queue configuration shared across trials
fields.pixel_subsample: Fraction of pixels sampled per image, 1.0 keeps all
fields.keep_empty_frac: Fraction of empty-profile pixels retained during training

tuning/jepa::JepaTuneConfig.summary: Selects pretrained autoencoders and target strategy for JEPA-backbone hyperparameter tuning

fields.profile_autoencoder_logdir: Directory holding pretrained profile-autoencoder runs to import from
fields.profile_autoencoder_run: Name of specific profile-autoencoder run; None picks default
fields.image_autoencoder_logdir: Directory holding pretrained image-autoencoder runs to import from
fields.image_autoencoder_run: Name of specific image-autoencoder run; None picks default
fields.embedding_loss: Configuration for the embedding-matching loss between branches
fields.param_loss: Configuration for Gaussian-parameter reconstruction loss; L1 enabled by default
